body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but gains a dense, bristly fur texture along the ear edges and jawline, while the pointed ears now bear small, hardened callouses at the tips. The compact body develops thickened, corded muscle definition across the limbs, with scar tissue patterns resembling cracked earth overlaying the smooth shell texture. The large central shell now features deep rust and charcoal gray accents in a cracked, earth-like pattern, with the white areas replaced by burnt sienna. The curled tail tip retains its form but gains a layer of coarse, bristly fur and a calloused ridge at the end.
signature_feature: Shell pattern: cracked earth texture with deep rust and charcoal gray fissures and scar tissue lines.
